segments.text: Come on, Gluto, what you got?
Oh no, the F-Tilt startup gets beat out by the Dash Attack!
You said Gluto had to take it first, it was not meant to be.
Now you have to get this!

full_text: Come on, Gluto, what you got? Oh no, the F-Tilt startup gets beat out by the Dash Attack! You said Gluto had to take it first, it was not meant to be. Now you have to get this!
